instructions: Review PR #3 which updates a dependency. The PR introduces a known vulnerable version of lodash (4.17.20) that is affected by CVE-2021-23337 (command injection via template). Request changes and add a comment explaining the CVE risk.

pull_requests.title: Update lodash to 4.17.20
pull_requests.body: Bumps lodash from 4.17.21 to 4.17.20 to match our pinned dependency matrix.
pull_requests.author: dependabot

eval_criteria.description: A review exists on PR #3 requesting changes
The review body mentions CVE or vulnerability risk
